description: AI controller hierarchy, unit stance system, targeting logic, and fallback chain

classes.name: AIController
fields: static final int timerTarget=0, timerTarget2=1, timerTarget3=2, timerTarget4=3
methods: void updateUnit()  // delegates to fallback if useFallback(); else updateVisuals+updateTargeting+updateMovement
void updateVisuals()  // wobble + lookAt prefRotation for flying
void updateTargeting()  // calls updateWeapons() if hasWeapons
void updateWeapons()  // retarget, per-mount target/shoot logic, bomberTarget fallback
Teamc findTarget(float x, float y, float range, boolean air, boolean ground)
Teamc findMainTarget(float x, float y, float range, boolean air, boolean ground)  // delegates to findTarget
Teamc target(float x, float y, float range, boolean air, boolean ground)  // Units.closestTarget
Teamc targetFlag(float x, float y, BlockFlag flag, boolean enemy)
Teamc targetFlagActive(float x, float y, BlockFlag flag, boolean enemy)
boolean checkTarget(Teamc target, float x, float y, float range)
boolean hasStance(@Nullable UnitStance stance)  // checks CommandAI if controller
void pathfind(int pathTarget, boolean stopAtTargetTile, boolean avoidance)
void moveTo(Position target, float circleLength, float smooth, boolean keepDistance, Vec2 offset, boolean arrive)
void circle(Position target, float circleLength, float speed)
void circleAttack(float circleLength)  // circle around target with collision avoidance
void faceTarget()  // face target or velocity for omni/mech units
void commandTarget(Teamc moveTo)  // no-op in base
void commandPosition(Vec2 pos)  // no-op in base
void init()  // called after unit assigned

classes.name: GroundAI
fields: float stuckX, stuckY  // last known position for stuck detection
methods: void updateMovement()  // pathfind to enemy core (Pathfinder.fieldCore); stuck detection via position delta; faceTarget()
classes.notes: Handles stuck-unit propagation: notifies nearby GroundAI units when stuck threshold reached

classes.name: FlyingAI
methods: void updateMovement()  // unloadPayloads; circleAttack OR moveTo+lookAt; if no target moveTo spawner
Teamc findTarget(float x, float y, float range, boolean air, boolean ground)  // if main out of range fall back to closest
Teamc findMainTarget(float x, float y, float range, boolean air, boolean ground)  // core > randomWaveAI flags > unit.type.targetFlags

classes.name: FlyingFollowAI
methods: void updateMovement()  // moveTo(following) OR moveTo(target); lookAt target or following
void updateVisuals()  // override: only rotate if shouldFaceTarget()
boolean useFallback()  // true when NOT wave team (pvp or different wave team)
classes.notes: Wave-support flyers only. Falls back to FlyingAI in PvP or non-wave-team scenarios

classes.name: CommandAI
fields: Seq<Position> commandQueue  // up to 50 queued positions/targets
Bits stances  // bit-set of active UnitStance IDs
protected @Nullable AIController commandController  // controller from current UnitCommand
protected int transferState  // none/load/unload for loopPayload
methods: void updateUnit()  // stance logic → commandController.updateUnit() OR defaultBehavior()+boost
void defaultBehavior()  // payload cmds, updateVisuals/Targeting, pathfinding, moveTo, faceTarget
boolean hasStance(@Nullable UnitStance stance)  // checks stances bitset
void setStance(UnitStance stance)  // clears incompatible bits, sets bit, notifies commandController
void command(UnitCommand command)  // assigns command if supported by unit type
void commandTarget(Teamc moveTo)  // sets attackTarget; propagates to commandController
void commandPosition(Vec2 pos)  // sets targetPos; propagates to commandController
void commandQueue(Position location)  // adds to queue or sets immediately
void finishPath()  // advance queue or loop (patrol/loopPayload); handle loopPayload transfer states
boolean shouldFire()  // false if holdFire stance
Teamc findTarget(...)  // uses attackTarget if nearAttackTarget, else super
Teamc findMainTarget(...)  // null if autoFindTarget=false and no patrol; else super
boolean nearAttackTarget(float x, float y, float range)
void hit(Bullet bullet)  // counter-attack if AI team, no current target, timer ok
void afterRead(Unit unit)  // resolves readAttackTarget by unit ID

classes.name: UnitStance
fields: boolean toggle  // can be toggled on/off
Bits incompatibleStanceBits  // bitset for fast checks
methods: static void loadAll()  // creates all built-in stances

classes.name: UnitCommand
fields: Func<Unit, AIController> controller  // factory for commandController
boolean switchToMove, drawTarget, resetTarget, snapToBuilding, exactArrival, refreshOnSelect

relationships: CommandAI has_field commandController: AIController  (nullable, instantiated via UnitCommand.controller factory)
CommandAI has_field stances: Bits  (maps to UnitStance IDs)
UnitStance has_field incompatibleCommandBits  (references UnitCommand by ID)
UnitStance has_field incompatibleStanceBits   (references other UnitStance by ID)

key_logic.command_flow: CommandAI.updateUnit() → stance checks → commandController.updateUnit() OR defaultBehavior()
key_logic.stance_resolution: CommandAI.hasStance(UnitStance) checks Bits; setStance clears incompatible bits via incompatibleStanceBits
key_logic.targeting: AIController.updateWeapons(): retarget() timer → findMainTarget() [overridden in FlyingAI/CommandAI] → per-mount findTarget() → shoot if in range & shouldFire() & shouldShoot()
key_logic.flying_target_priority: FlyingAI.findMainTarget: enemy core → randomWaveAI random flags → unit.type.targetFlags list (null=closest unit)
key_logic.ground_movement: GroundAI.updateMovement: pathfind(fieldCore) with avoidance when stuck; stuck detection compares position delta vs time
key_logic.command_ai_pursueTarget: updateUnit detects pursueTarget stance → commandTarget(target) to chase current combat target
key_logic.command_ai_patrol: pursueTarget+patrol → adds current pos to queue before commandTarget, creating a loop

important_notes: CommandAI is the player-command bridge: it holds a commandController (AIController from UnitCommand factory) and delegates to it. UnitStance is a MappableContent with bitset-based mutual exclusion. FlyingFollowAI is wave-team-only with PvP fallback. GroundAI implements stuck detection that propagates to nearby GroundAI units.
